posts.author: Tamilarasi (Tamilarasi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I’m facing an issue while trying to deploy Version 2 of my Item View app in Monday Apps framework.

My Version 1 deployed successfully without any issues.
But after making some small changes and trying to deploy Version 2, I keep getting this error:

“Failed to upload a project”

WhatsApp Image 2025-11-22 at 8.14.27 AM1280×705 68.9 KB

I tried multiple times and also checked my build, but the upload keeps failing after taking a long time.

Here’s what I’ve already checked:

  • Build completes without errors

  • No major changes from Version 1

  • Package size seems normal

  • Internet connection stable

Has anyone faced this issue?
Is this a problem with the Monday apps upload server or something related to my project configuration?

Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance!
